title.en: China-to-Sierra Leone Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入塞拉利昂：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入獅子山：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Sierra Leone SLSB conformity requirements, EWRC licensing, EDSA grid-connection conditions, IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 62920 EMC, 50 Hz 230/400 V grid settings, off-grid and mini-grid IEC TS 62257 / VeraSol quality standards, and donor/lender procurement context — versus China GB/T 37408 and GB/T 19964 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与塞拉利昂SLSB合格评定要求、EWRC许可、EDSA并网条件、IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 62920 EMC、50 Hz 230/400 V电网参数、离网及微电网IEC TS 62257 / VeraSol质量标准及捐助方/贷款方采购背景——对比中国GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與獅子山SLSB合格評定要求、EWRC許可、EDSA併網條件、IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 62920 EMC、50 Hz 230/400 V電網參數、離網及微電網IEC TS 62257 / VeraSol質量標準及捐助方/貸款方採購背景——對比中國GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, SLSB conformity scope determination, EWRC licensing decision, EDSA grid-connection approval, donor or lender procurement eligibility determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, installers, and project developers should verify current Sierra Leone SLSB technical regulations, EWRC licensing requirements, EDSA grid-connection technical conditions, donor/lender procurement standards (including VeraSol and IEC TS 62257 for off-grid applications), and project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、SLSB合格评定范围裁定、EWRC许可决定、EDSA并网批准、捐助方或贷款方采购资格裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方、安装方和项目开发商在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行塞拉利昂SLSB技术法规、EWRC许可要求、EDSA并网技术条件、捐助方/贷款方采购标准（包括适用于离网应用的VeraSol和IEC TS 62257）及项目业主要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、SLSB合格評定範圍裁定、EWRC許可決定、EDSA併網批准、捐助方或貸款方採購資格裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方、安裝方和項目開發商在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行獅子山SLSB技術法規、EWRC許可要求、EDSA併網技術條件、捐助方/貸款方採購標準（包括適用於離網應用的VeraSol和IEC TS 62257）及項目業主要求。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Sierra Leone, the key practical gaps are: (1) SLSB conformity assessment — Sierra Leone Standards Bureau is adopting IEC-referenced standards and may require conformity evidence; Chinese GB/T certificates are not automatically accepted; (2) EWRC licensing — the Electricity and Water Regulatory Commission licenses electricity infrastructure; equipment must meet conditions set in EWRC licences and project approvals; (3) EDSA grid-connection conditions — for grid-tied systems, EDSA connection requires IEC-referenced inverter specifications including IEC 62109-1/-2 safety, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, and 230/400 V 50 Hz firmware settings, not the 220/380 V Chinese GB/T 156 baseline; (4) for off-grid and mini-grid applications (which dominate the Sierra Leone market given approximately 25% electrification), donor-driven and lender-driven projects typically require VeraSol Tier qualification and/or IEC TS 62257 compliance — Chinese domestic approvals do not satisfy these; (5) humidity, coastal salt-air, and Harmattan dust derating must be documented for Sierra Leone's climate zones. China GB/T 37408 and GB/T 19964 baselines do not satisfy IEC-referenced SLSB, EWRC, EDSA, or donor/lender requirements and cannot be substituted without supplementary IEC test evidence.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口塞拉利昂时，主要实际差距包括：（1）SLSB合格评定——塞拉利昂标准局正采纳IEC参考标准，可能要求合格评定证据；中国GB/T证书不被自动接受；（2）EWRC许可——电力和水务监管委员会对电力基础设施颁发许可；设备须满足EWRC许可和项目审批中规定的条件；（3）EDSA并网条件——对于并网系统，EDSA并网要求IEC参考逆变器规格，包括IEC 62109-1/-2安全、IEC 62116防孤岛及230/400 V 50 Hz固件设置，而非中国GB/T 156的220/380 V基准；（4）对于离网和微电网应用（鉴于塞拉利昂约25%的电气化率，此类应用占市场主导地位），捐助方和贷款方主导的项目通常要求VeraSol等级认证和/或IEC TS 62257合规——中国国内审批不满足此类要求；（5）须针对塞拉利昂气候区记录高湿度、沿海盐雾和哈马丹沙尘降额情况。中国GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964基准不满足SLSB、EWRC、EDSA或捐助方/贷款方的IEC参考要求，不可在没有补充IEC测试证据的情况下替代。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口獅子山時，主要實際差距包括：（1）SLSB合格評定——獅子山標準局正採納IEC參考標準，可能要求合格評定證據；中國GB/T證書不被自動接受；（2）EWRC許可——電力和水務監管委員會對電力基礎設施頒發許可；設備須滿足EWRC許可和項目審批中規定的條件；（3）EDSA併網條件——對於併網系統，EDSA併網要求IEC參考逆變器規格，包括IEC 62109-1/-2安全、IEC 62116防孤島及230/400 V 50 Hz韌體設置，而非中國GB/T 156的220/380 V基準；（4）對於離網和微電網應用（鑑於獅子山約25%的電氣化率，此類應用占市場主導地位），捐助方和貸款方主導的項目通常要求VeraSol等級認證和/或IEC TS 62257合規——中國國內審批不滿足此類要求；（5）須針對獅子山氣候區記錄高濕度、沿海鹽霧和哈馬丹沙塵降額情況。中國GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964基準不滿足SLSB、EWRC、EDSA或捐助方/貸款方的IEC參考要求，不可在沒有補充IEC測試證據的情況下替代。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
